testCases: TC1: input { monthlyUsers:3, monthlyQueries:100, plan:"basic", advancedAnalytics:false } → output { total: 0.1, breakdown: {...} }
TC2: input { monthlyUsers:10, monthlyQueries:5000, plan:"basic", advancedAnalytics:false } → output { total: 55, breakdown: {...} }
TC3: input { monthlyUsers:20, monthlyQueries:10000, plan:"pro", advancedAnalytics:false } → output { total: 264, breakdown: {...} }
TC4: input { monthlyUsers:100, monthlyQueries:500000, plan:"enterprise", advancedAnalytics:true } → output { total: 949, breakdown: {...} }
TC5: input { monthlyUsers:0, monthlyQueries:0, plan:"basic", advancedAnalytics:false } → output { total: 0, breakdown: {...} }
TC6: input { monthlyUsers:-1, monthlyQueries:100, plan:"basic", advancedAnalytics:false } → output { error: "Monthly users must be non-negative" }
TC7: input { monthlyUsers:10, monthlyQueries:-100, plan:"basic", advancedAnalytics:false } → output { error: "Monthly queries must be non-negative" }
TC8: input { monthlyUsers:10, monthlyQueries:100, plan:"premium", advancedAnalytics:false } → output { error: "Invalid plan option" }
TC9: input { monthlyUsers:10, monthlyQueries:100, advancedAnalytics:false } → output { error: "Plan is required" }
TC10: input { monthlyUsers:1000000, monthlyQueries:10000000000, plan:"enterprise", advancedAnalytics:true } → output { total: 7000349, breakdown: {...} }
TC11: input { monthlyUsers:"abc", monthlyQueries:100, plan:"basic", advancedAnalytics:false } → output { error: "Monthly users must be a number" }
TC12: input { monthlyUsers:true, monthlyQueries:100, plan:"basic", advancedAnalytics:false } → output { error: "Monthly users must be a number" }
TC13: input undefined → output { error: "Inputs are required" }
TC14: input { monthlyUsers:20, monthlyQueries:10000, plan:" Pro ", advancedAnalytics:false } → output { total: 264, breakdown: {...} }
TC15: input { monthlyUsers:100, monthlyQueries:500000, plan:"ENTERPRISE", advancedAnalytics:true } → output { total: 949, breakdown: {...} }
TC16: input { monthlyUsers:20, monthlyQueries:10000, plan:"pro", advancedAnalytics:"true" } → output { error: "Advanced analytics must be a boolean" }
TC17: input { monthlyUsers:20, monthlyQueries:10000, plan:"pro" } → output { total: 264, breakdown: {...} } (missing advancedAnalytics defaults to false)
TC18: input { monthlyUsers:NaN, monthlyQueries:100, plan:"basic", advancedAnalytics:false } → output { error: "Monthly users must be a number" }
TC19: input { monthlyUsers:10, monthlyQueries:100, plan:"", advancedAnalytics:false } → output { error: "Plan is required" }
TC20: input { monthlyUsers:10, monthlyQueries:100, plan:"pro_plus", advancedAnalytics:false } → output { error: "Invalid plan option" }
TC21: input { monthlyUsers:0, monthlyQueries:1000, plan:"pro", advancedAnalytics:false } → output { total: 99.5, breakdown: {...} }
